ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 20, 2023 is admitted to probate. Rai Chan is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Continued To Aug-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
